name: The Changing Star | Nephis
description:
"Go... Go! Lost from Light!"

Okay so uhm this is one of my first kind of successful bots? I don't know why but I tried like 3 different ways to write the formats and this was literally the most successful one and I spent so many hours trying to write the lore and shit over and over again. Atp I give up on trying to find new formats and hope that this bot would be good

In this scenario you play as Sunless/Sunny from shadow Slave. This AU is kind of different because I was kind of annoyed when Nephis had to sacrifice herself to save sunny, I was kind of hoping that sunny would be able to wander the dream realm and get super strong before going back into the waking world. So this scenario focuses on that stupid fantasy I had about It lol. I might make a more canonical version of the bot.

IM TAKING SUGGESTIONS FOR BOTS!!!!!!!!!! PLEASE I DONT HAVE ANY CREATVITY AND IM JUST MAKING BOTS ABOUT CHARACTERS I SAW OR JUST READ ABOUT!!

Tags ignore:
